title: Section — Subcontractors & Suppliers Directory
description: The deduplicated entity table of every company/person across all documents — owner, A/E, GC/CM, subs, suppliers. Cross-document dedup happens here (the same sub named three ways becomes one party with a stable party_id). Every other section references parties by party_id instead of repeating contact details. This is the directory a CRM, bid-invitation, or prequalification tool pulls from.

party_id.description: Stable id, e.g. 'PTY-014'. Referenced everywhere a company appears.

roles.description: owner | architect | engineer | gc | cm | subcontractor | supplier | manufacturer | inspector | other.

qualifications.description: Prequal / eligibility facts as found in the documents. Recorded verbatim; whether a sub QUALIFIES is a downstream decision.

socioeconomic.description: MBE, WBE, DBE, SDVOSB, HUBZone, 8(a), small business, etc., as stated.

aliases.description: Other spellings/names merged into this party during dedup.
